examples: He was suffering from chronic bronchitis.
She had feared she was coming down with pneumonia or bronchitis.
Ancient cultures used the spice as an antiseptic and to treat cholera and bronchitis.
Not long after he arrived in Boston, he treated an Armenian woman for chronic bronchitis.
Hospitalized after a motorcycle accident, Keating contracted bronchitis, exacerbated by pulmonary disease and a heart ailment.
